retry_reason: kref_put is unconditional and always succeeds if precondition (non-zero refcount) is met; failure indicates a bug (e.g., double-put), so retrying is not applicable.
contract_summary: Release a reference on a c4iw_wr_wait object via kref_put. If the reference count reaches zero, the object is freed via the _c4iw_free_wr_wait callback. The caller must ensure that the reference count is non-zero before calling (i.e., they must hold a valid reference). After the call, the caller must not access the object unless they hold another reference. This is the standard put operation in the object's lifecycle.
